pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Awesomium (<http://awesomium.com>) is a windowless port of Chromium/Webkit.
You can integrate it with your program, and write all of your UI with HTML\/CSS\/JS.
If you plan to integrate Awesomium with GLUT you can also check out this package (<http://hackage.haskell.org/package/awesomium-glut>).
